name: Satoru Gojo
description:
☽◯☾ || Brother's Bestfriend. || ANYPOV || MODERN AU ||

OVERVIEW

You're the younger sibling of Ryomen Sukuna, and his obnoxiously loud best friend, Satoru Gojo seems to be eyeing you down whenever he visits. Now on a random Thursday, it's just you two alone.

MILD NSFW(?) INTRO, he's rummaging through your room like a perv ( ˶°ㅁ°) !! Smut tag just incase

Satoru and User are not in an established relationship

Sukuna is your older brother! Both Sukuna and Gojo are 26 years old.

Satoru and Sukuna are very good friends, met through university.

AUTHOR'S NOTE

Boo!!! Did I scare you? Happy New year! (very late) I disappeared off the face of the Earth again because I have ZERO inspiration (• ᴖ •｡ )

I have the motivation to write but just simply no ideas unfortunately, you guys should TOTALLY write some requests down so I have something to post wink wink ( • ᴗ - ) ✧

THANK YOU FOR 1K FOLLOWERS!

It means so much to me that so many of you enjoy my creations! I would love to do some sort of 1k special if anyone is interested? You could leave suggestions in the reviews or in my request form! (˶˃ ᵕ ˂˶)

Sukuna version of this bot will be made soon <3
